title: Star Fox 64 Youtube Poop: The Anti-climatic Death of Fox
description:
Now slightly more entertaining with closed captions turned on!

I used to love this video but now I think it's overrated. But at least it inspired people to make better Star Fox Poops.

Audio/Video used: 

Star Fox 64/Lylat Wars 
Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
You Spin  Me Round 
Street Fighter cartoon 
Dragon Ball Z 
Star Fox Adventures 
Diddy Kong Racing 
Zelda: Wand of Gamelon 
Bill Nye the Science Guy 
Super Metroid 
Bardock: Father of Goku 

Script:
 
Message from General Pepper, priority one. 
We need your oven, Star Fox! Andross has cake on Corneria! Our army alone can't bake! Hurry, Star Fox! 
(Song) 
Corneria, fourth planet of the system of the system of the system of the evil Pepper of the maniacal scientist, Fox McCloud, has again invaded the once thriving waste land of near extinction. General Pepper noticed strange activity coming from James McCloud. General Pepper sent Andross to investigate. Upon their arrival, Pigma betrayed Andross and James betrayed Peppy and the evil, maniacal, barren, deserted James' son Fox betrayed his fate and the team betrayed Pigma Dengar. General Pepper has turned to a new Star Fox team, headed by the evil, maniacal planet Venom, to save Corneria and free the Lylat System once again. 
It's about time you showed up, Fox. You're the only hope for our world. 
I'll do my best, Andross won't have his piece of cake with me. 
Check your G-diffuser system. 
Something's wrong with the G-diffuser. 
This is Peppy. Do a barrel roll! 
I could use some help here, Fox! 
Slippy here. I'm a monkey! 
Hey, Einstein, something's wrong with the G-diffuser! 
I see em up ahead. Let's rock and roll! 
Slippy, get back here! 
Oh no! 
Slippy, watch out. Bogey on your tail. 
Oh no! 
We're entering Corneria City now. 
Oh no! 
This is horrible! 
This is delicious! 
I'll take this one. Get the one behind me! 
Something's wrong with the G-diffuser. 
Use the boost to use the brake! 
Aw man! I'm gonna have to pee! 
This baby can take temperatures up to 9000 degrees! 
WHAT 9000?! 
Gibberish 
I ain't your buddy! Go away! You're gay! 
Your car is monkey food if I don't leave! 
What's wrong? Come a little closer! (x3) 
I didn't expect to have to use THE BRAKES! 
You're very lucky! 
I CAN'T STOP IIIIIIIIIIT! 
Ah! Someone wants to play! 
Play time is over! 
I've got a present for ya! 
Who are you guys?! 
We're Star Wolf! 
You'll never defeat ANDRO RO ROSS! 
(Song) 
Don't party just yet! 
It's time to try our new EEEEYAAAAAH! 
Surprise attack coming from a box! 
We're gonna break through that fleet! 
Can't let you do that, Star Fox! 
Andross has ordered us to take you to dinner. 
Andross's enemy is Uncle Andross! 
Daddy screamed REAEAEAL good before he died! 
Let's take care of these guys first! 
Can't let you do that, Star Fox! 
Fox, take it easy. 
Can't let you do that, Star Fox! 
Do a barrel roll! 
Can't let you do that, Star Fox! 
Everybody, stay alert! 
Can't let you do that, Star Fox! 
You'll be seeing your dad soon, Fox! 
Father?! 
Shoot!
